tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch the raw HTML content from a URL (e.g. via curl). Returns the response body as a string.

tools.name: save_page
tools.description: Save HTML content to a local file path.

path.description: Local filesystem path where to save the file.

tools.name: extract_dom_content
tools.description: Extract text content from HTML at a given DOM location (CSS selector or XPath).

path.description: Path to the local HTML file to parse.

selector.description: CSS selector or XPath identifying the element(s) to extract.

tools.name: validate_content
tools.description: Check whether extracted content contains the expected text (exact or substring match).

extracted_content.description: The text that was extracted from the page.

expected_text.description: The text that must appear in the extracted content.
